notableEvents.label: Pickoff
notableEvents.detail: Throwing error by pitcher Cade Cavalli on the pickoff attempt.

notableEvents.label: Nico Hoerner reached on error
notableEvents.detail: Nico Hoerner reaches on a throwing error by third baseman Brady House.

notableEvents.label: Nico Hoerner GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Nico Hoerner grounds into a double play, second baseman Nasim Nuñez to first baseman Luis García Jr. Pete Crow-Armstrong out at 2nd. Nico Hoerner out at 1st.

notableEvents.detail: Nico Hoerner reaches on a throwing error by third baseman Brady House.
